name: GetCustomerOperationsSnapshot
bodySql:
SELECT id, name, segment, region, account_manager, annual_value
FROM customers
WHERE id = @customerId;
SELECT ticket_id, site_code, priority, ticket_status, work_order_status, technician_name, severity_score
FROM ticket_command_center
WHERE customer_id = @customerId
ORDER BY severity_score DESC, ticket_id;
SELECT invoice_id, contract_code, invoice_status, total, due_date
FROM billing_snapshot
WHERE customer_id = @customerId
ORDER BY invoice_date DESC;
description: Returns the customer record, current dispatch board rows, and invoice snapshot for one account.

name: DispatchWorkOrder
bodySql:
UPDATE work_orders
SET technician_id = @technicianId,
    scheduled_date = @scheduledDate,
    status = @newStatus
WHERE id = @workOrderId;
SELECT customer_name, site_code, ticket_id, work_order_id, work_order_status, technician_name, scheduled_date, severity_score
FROM ticket_command_center
WHERE work_order_id = @workOrderId;
SELECT work_order_id, old_status, new_status, changed_date
FROM work_order_status_history
WHERE work_order_id = @workOrderId
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 5;
description: Assigns or reschedules a work order, then returns the board row plus recent status history.

name: ReceiveInventory
description: Records an inbound inventory receipt and returns the updated on-hand position.
